Business: Jet Freight Logistics Limited engages in the logistics and freight forwarding business in India and internationally. The company offers air and ocean freight, rail and surface transportation, courier, customs clearance, and warehousing services, as well as door-to-door delivery services.   Current: 120.50  (-0.21% vs prior)
  India impact: Stronger DXY → FII outflows from India, rupee weakens; weaker DXY → FII inflows rise

Fed Funds Rate [2026-07-14]
  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.28% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

CBOE VIX [2026-07-14]
  Current: 16.50  (-3.85% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

US 10Y Treasury Yield [2026-06-01]
  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
